IMethodSettings Interface

One Identity Manager API Server

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IMethodSettings

The IMethodSettings type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AllowUnauthenticated
Gets or sets a value indicating whether this method can be called without first authenticating the session.
ClientSuffix
Sets a client suffix for this method, in case it differs from other methods only by the use of parameters.
Defaults
Description
Gets or sets a descriptive text for this method.
Disabled
Gets or sets a flag indicating whether this method is disabled.
DoNotCreateSessionGroup
Indicates if a call to this API should not create a new session group if one does not exist yet.
ExcludeFromApiDoc
IsDeprecated
Gets or sets a flag indicating if all routes for this method are deprecated.
Method
MethodValidation
Module
Gets the declaring module for this method.
Parameters
Returns the list of parameters for this method.
ProcessingRequest
Raised when a request is processed for this method.
SortOrder
Gets or sets the priority for this method. Methods with a lower sort order are tried first.
Url
Validators
Returns the list of validators for this method.

Methods
  NameDescription
